headline: FedEx Freight Spinoff Sharpens Valuation Picture And Segment Focus
summary: FedEx (NYSE:FDX) is moving into the final phase of spinning off its FedEx Freight division, targeting completion around June 1. The company has shared detailed financial targets and a roadmap for FedEx Freight to operate as an independent, less-than-truckload-focused business. Recent investor presentations outlined leadership appointments and target customer segments at the standalone freight company. For you as a FedEx shareholder or watcher, this planned separation matters because FedEx...

headline: UPS Stock Trades at a Discounted Valuation: Is it a Buy Signal?
summary: United Parcel Service trades below peers as it pivots to higher-margin healthcare and B2B, cuts Amazon volume and targets $3B savings --- buy or value trap?

headline: FedEx, pilots agree on tentative contract after 5 years of talks
summary: FedEx and its pilots have reached a tentative agreement on a new labor contract, but it took five long years to get there. The post FedEx, pilots agree on tentative contract after 5 years of talks appeared first on FreightWaves.

raw.headline: FedEx, pilots agree on tentative contract after 5 years of talks
raw.summary: FedEx and its pilots have reached a tentative agreement on a new labor contract, but it took five long years to get there. The post FedEx, pilots agree on tentative contract after 5 years of talks appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: FedEx Pilots Reach Tentative Deal With Nearly 40% Pay Increase
summary: Proposed agreement includes significant raises and retroactive pay, covering over 5,000 pilots after years of negotiations.

raw.headline: FedEx Pilots Reach Tentative Deal With Nearly 40% Pay Increase
raw.summary: Proposed agreement includes significant raises and retroactive pay, covering over 5,000 pilots after years of negotiations.

headline: First-Time Business Owner Opens New PostalAnnex Location in Schaumburg, Illinois
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., one of the leading franchisors in the packing, shipping and office services industries, is proud to announce the opening of its newest PostalAnnex location in Schaumburg, IL to new owners, Jinali and Hardik Patel. This new PostalAnnex is set to offer a wide range of essential shipping, mailbox rental and office services to the local community.

raw.headline: First-Time Business Owner Opens New PostalAnnex Location in Schaumburg, Illinois

headline: New Ownership of PostalAnnex in Spring, Texas Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services for Nearly 20 Years
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing PostalAnnex location in Spring, TX to new owner, Masooma Qutubuddin. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this PostalAnnex location for nearly 20 years.

headline: FedEx Freight provides medium-term finanical outlook at Investor Day

headline: FedEx, pilots union reach tentative contract agreement
summary: The deal, which would raise pilots’ hourly wages by nearly 40%, is the second tentative pact between the two parties during a multiyear negotiations process.

headline: FedEx to close Plattsburgh facility in June
summary: PLATTSBURGH — In preparation for transitioning to FedEx Network 2.0, the company is closing over 150 facilities nationwide, including one in Plattsburgh. FedEx media relations told the Press-Republican in an email the FedEx shipping center located at 768 Route 3 in Plattsburgh will be closed. “As part of our previously announced network transformation strategy, the FedEx facility on Route 3 in ...
